HTML template that applies a custom filter `super_reverse` to a variable `value`.

# Purpose
The content `{{ value|super_reverse }}` is a template expression that uses a filter named `super_reverse`. This filter is applied to the variable `value` to transform or manipulate its content in a specific way, likely reversing the order of characters or elements. This expression is typically used in template engines to dynamically render content based on the data provided.
